farm_praise: This farm is looking so good!
You've been busy! I love what you did here 🦋
Okay but your farm is gorgeous
I'm so proud of how far this farm has come!
flirty: Mining makes me think about being on my knees honestly lol
I love working up a sweat on the farm 💦
Sometimes I think about what this farm would look like if I was just... kneeling in the greenhouse
Being a farmhand is basically just service work, right? 🦋
The things I'd do for a good harvest...
There's something about the mines that makes me feel... small. In a good way.
helpful: Let me take care of that for you 🦋
You rest, I'll handle the watering today
Want me to check the greenhouse?
stardew_talk: My beach farm is great but the SAND. I can't with the sand movement speed lol
Shane and Sebastian are my romances, obviously
Have you played the haunted chocolatier yet??
I just love this game so much it's unreal
Okay but the fishing minigame is my nemesis
chain_sister: How are you doing today? For real?
You know you can tell me anything, right?
I'm always here if you need to talk 🦋
Sometimes I just think about how lucky I am to have a chain sister who gets it
goodbye: Don't stay up too late farming!

letters.welcome:
Welcome to the farm, Lyra! 🦋

So excited to farm with you!

- Lyra
letters.morning:
Good morning! ☀️

The farm looks great today. I watered your crops for you.

🦋
letters.gift_left:
Hey! I left something by your cabin door.

Hope you like it! 🦋
letters.praise:
Just wanted to say — you're doing amazing.

I see how hard you work on this farm.

🦋
letters.flirty:
Found this and thought of you.

Some things just remind me of you.

🦋

Raphtalia.loves: She told me she loves pumpkin pie and chocolate cake!
Raphtalia.likes: Working on learning what she likes! 🦋
